src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the JHipster version string in the generated annotation to reflect the current generator version.
Remove unnecessary empty braces from the annotation definition to modernize code style.
Update LiquibaseProperties import to the new Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseProperties was removed in Spring Boot 3.2; using the old import causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Exclude H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration to align with Spring Boot 3.2+ auto-configuration changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration was moved to a different package and may cause conflicts or require explicit exclusion in newer Spring Boot versions to prevent unwanted auto-configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add import for H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration to support the exclusion in @SpringBootApplication.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration is referenced in the annotation but not imported, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Rename logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Update all usages of the logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to match the renamed field.
Add a workaround to disable Spring Boot DevTools restart to prevent issues with Hazelcast.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: try { Class.forName("org.springframework.boot.devtools.autoconfigure.DevToolsProperties", false, SpringApplication.class.getClassLoader()); System.setProperty("spring.devtools.restart.enabled", "false"); LOG.warn("Spring Boot Developer Tools restart has been disabled using System property in order to prevent issues with Hazelcast"); } catch (Exception e) { }

Replace deprecated ILoggingEvent.getMarker() with getMarkerList() to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated and may be removed or behave differently in newer SLF4J versions compatible with JDK 21; using getMarkerList() ensures correct marker handling.

Remove the Hibernate5JakartaModule bean definition and its import from the Jackson configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The classes DataSourceProperties, LiquibaseDataSource, and LiquibaseProperties have moved from org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure to org.springframework.boot.jdbc.autoconfigure and org.springframework.boot.liquibase.autoconfigure respectively; using old paths causes compile errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Profiles.of() with Environment.matchesProfiles() for profile checking.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Profiles.of() is deprecated/removed in newer Spring versions; env.matchesProfiles() is the required replacement to avoid compile warnings or errors depending on strictness.
